सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के िनयम 5 और 7 के साथ प琇ठत सांि榐यक琉य सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 (2009 का 7) यथा संशोिधत 2017 (2017 का 21) क琉 धारा 3 और 4 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का उपयोग करते 牣ए, एत獵ारा एक सांि榐यक琉य सव犇楹ण, िजसे इसके आगे ‘वा琔ष榁क औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2018-19’ के 牲प म犆 संद琔भ榁त 琈कया जाएगा, के मा瀇यम से अनुसूची-I म犆 उि瀖लिखत 瀑योरे के अनुसार िविनमा榁ण तथा इससे संबंिधत काय榁कलाप犘 के बारे म犆 आंकड़े एक灴 करने का िनद犇श देता है। 2. इसके अलावा, मं灴ालय उपयु榁猴 िनद犇श犘 के संदभ榁 म犆 अनुसूची-II म犆 उि瀖लिखत 玐ि猴य犘 और साथ ही काया榁लय म犆 उनके नािमितय犘 को, उसम犆 दी गई भौगोिलक इकाइय犘 के संबंध म犆 सांि榐यक琉 अिधका琇रय犘 के 牲प म犆 िनयु猴 करता है । 灹瀄येक सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली 2011 के साथ संल猶 फाम榁-I नामक िनधा榁琇रत 灹प灴 म犆 भर कर एक वचनब瀈ध त瀄काल अपर महािनदेशक, 楹े灴 संकाय榁 灹भाग, रा玘ीय सांि榐यक琉य काया榁लय, नई 琈द瀖ली को 灹瀡तुत करेगा । 3. संबंिधत सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा 灹ािधकृत 玐ि猴, सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के साथ संल猶 फाम榁-I नामक िनधा榁琇रत 灹प灴 म犆 भरा गया गया वचनब瀈ध सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी को 灹瀡तुत करने के प玑ात 灹प灴 म犆 सूचनादाता 獧ारा दी गई सूचना के स瀄यापन, त瀄संबंधी 琇रकॉड猀 क琉 जांच, और जैसा भी आव瀙यक हो, 瀡प玗ीकरण मांगने के िलये, सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी के भौगोिलक काय榁楹े灴 म犆 िनयु猴 琈कये जाएंगे । इन कत榁玐犘 के अनुसार, 灹瀄येक 玐ि猴 फोटो पहचान प灴 अथवा संबंिधत सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा जारी 灹ािधकार प灴 अपने साथ रखेगा । सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 灹ािधकृत 玐ि猴य犘 獧ारा 灹瀡तुत वचनब瀈ध को सुरि楹त अिभर楹ा म犆 रखेगा तथा -- 1 of 9 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] उपरो猴 वचनब瀈ध 灹ा玅 करने का 灹माण प灴 अपर महािनदेशक, 楹े灴 संकाय榁 灹भाग, रा玘ीय सांि榐यक琉य काया榁लय, नई 琈द瀖ली को अ灡ेिषत करेगा। 4. उपयु榁猴 िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार वा琔ष榁क औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण (एएसआई) अनुसूची के भाग I म犆 एक灴 琈कए गए आंकड़े, उिचत स瀄यापन और जांच के बाद, उप महािनदेशक, औ獸ोिगक सांि榐यक琉 瀡कंध, कोलकाता के काया榁लय म犆 काय榁रत अिधका琇रय犘 獧ारा संसािधत 琈कया जाएगा तथा वा琔ष榁क औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण (एएसआई) अनुसूची के भाग II म犆 एकि灴त आंकड़犘 को 炈म 瀑यूरो म犆 काय榁रत अिधका琇रय犘 獧ारा संसािधत 琈कया जाएगा। सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम 2008 के 灹ावधान犘 तथा सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के 灹ावधान犘 के अनुसार, सांि榐यक琉य तकनीक犘 के मा瀇यम से उ瀄पा琈दत डाटा से तैयार ईकाई 瀡तरीय आंकडे एवं 琇रपोट犈 म瀈灴ालय के औ獸ोिगक सांि榐यक琉 瀡कंध तथा आंकडा सं灡हण एवं 灹सार 灹भाग और 炈म तथा रोजगार म瀈灴ालय के अ瀈तग榁त 炈म 瀑यूरो क琉 अिभर楹ा म犆 रखे जाएं तथा उनके 獧ारा सरकार के नीित िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार सरकार तथा सरकार के बाहर के 灹योगकता榁猒, रा榖य犘/संघ रा榖य 楹े灴犘 तथा आम जनता के 灹योग हेतु 灹सा琇रत 琈कया जाए। 5. वा琔ष榁क औ獸ोिगक सव犇楹ण 2018-19 से स瀓बंिधत 琈कसी भी काय榁कलाप, जैसे आंकडा सं灡हण, आंकडा 灹सं瀡करण तथा 灹चार 灹सार म犆 लगे सभी 玐ि猴 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण अिधिनयम, 2008 और सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण िनयमावली, 2011 के 灹ावधान犘 獧ारा अिधशािसत ह犘गे । 6. सांि榐यक琉य अिधका琇रय犘 को िन玈िलिखत शि猴यां 灹दान क琉 गई ह犉 : (क) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी उपयु榁猴 िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार आंकडा सं灡हण के िलए, 玐वसाय संबंधी 琇रकाड榁 तथा अ瀈य 琇रकाड榁 के आधार पर सूचनादाता猒 獧ारा दी गई जानकारी का स瀄यापन करने तथा फै榉灩ी के 瀡वामी या अिधभो猴ा या फै榉灩ी के 灹भारी 玐ि猴 अथवा 灹ित玙ान या 灹ब瀈धन, जैसा भी मामला हो, जहां ऐसा 琇रकाड榁 रखा गया है वहां पर 瀡प玗ीकरण 灹ा玅 करन犆 के िलए कम榁चा琇रय犘 को 灹ितिनयु猴/灹ािधकृत करने के िलए अिधकार灹द牵 ह犉। सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी रा榖य सरकार犘/संघ शािसत 楹े灴犘 के 灹शासिनक िनय瀈灴णाधीन ऐसे कम榁चा琇रय犘 को 灹ितिनयु猴/灹ािधकृत करने के िलए अिधकार灹द牵 ह犉 जो उनम犆 से 琈कसी फै榉灩ी/灹ित玙ान से आंकडे एक灴 करना चाहता हो िजसके िलए सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा उसके 灹शासिनक िनय瀈灴णाधीन 琈कसी कम榁चारी को 灹ितिनयु猴/灹ािधकृत न 琈कया गया हो। (ख) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 灹瀄येक सूचनादाता को आंकडा सं灡हण के उ獴े瀙य से िनधा榁琇रत फाम榁 म犆 एक माह या जो भी अविध उिचत समझे, 琇रटन榁 灹瀡तुत करने के िलए नो琇टस जारी करने के िलए अिधकार 灹द牵 ह犉। (ग) सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 琈कसी भी सूचनादाता को वेबपोट榁ल् के मा瀇यम से एक िनि玑त अविध के िलए, जो उसके 獧ारा सूचनादाता को जारी नो琇टस म犆 दशा榁यी गई हो, इले榉灩ािनक 牲प म犆 琇रटन榁 灹瀡तुत करने क琉 सुिवधा 灹दान करने के िलए अिधकार 灹द牵 है। अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची अनुसूची----IIII सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण का का का का िवषय िवषय िवषय िवषय और और और और 灹योजन 灹योजन 灹योजन काय榁कलाप शािमल ह犉, के बारे म犆 आंकड़े एक灴 琈कए जाते ह犉 । -- 2 of 9 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण सं灡हण के के के के िलए िलए िलए अिधकारी अथवा काया榁लय का नाम, िजस इकाई अथवा िजन इकाइय犘 के बारे म犆 सूचना दी जानी है, उसका 瀑यौरा और 灹प灴 तथा िविध िजसके अनुसार सूचना 灹दान क琉 जानी अपेि楹त है, िजसम犆 इस उ獴े瀙य के िलए िन牱िपत तथा सूचनादाता猒 के िलए नो琇टस मे दशा榁यी गई िनि玑त ितिथ तक उपल瀑ध करवाए जाने वाले वेब पोट榁ल के मा瀇यम से इले榉灩ािनक 牲प म犆 सूचना 灹瀡तुत करना भी शािमल है का उ瀖लेख होगा। सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 सूचनादाता猒 का का का का बीड़ी एवं िसगार कामगार (रोजगार क琉 प琇रि瀡थितयां) अिधिनयम, 1966 के तहत पंजीकृत 灹ित玙ानो या िन玈िलिखत म犆 से 琈कसी भी अिधिनयम/बोड榁/灹ािधकरण जैसे कंपनी अिधिनयम 1956, दूकान तथा 玐यवसाियक 灹ित玙ान अिधिनयम, सोसायटी पंजीकरण अिधिनयम, सहकारी सिमित अिधिनयम, खादी एवं गामो獸ोग बोड榁, उ獸ोग िनदेशालय (िजला उ獸ोग के瀈灶) के अ瀈तग榁त पंजीकृत ह犉 के मािलक अथवा दखलकार या 灹भारी ह犉, िज瀈हे सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी 獧ारा उपयु榁猴 िनद犇श犘 के अनुसार, इकाइय犘 के बारे म犆 सूचना उपल瀑ध करवाने के िलए नो琇टस जारी 琈कया जाएगा । 5. सांि榐यक琉 अिधकारी उन दो अथवा अिधक इकाइय犘 या 灹ित玙ान犘 जो एक ही 灹ब瀈धन के अधीन रा榖य या संघीय 楹े灴 म犆 चल रही हो िजनके बारे म犆 灹瀄येक इकाई के अनुसार अलग-अलग सूचना उपल瀑ध नह牷 है तो संबंिधत 灹ब瀈धन के मािलक अथवा दखलकार या 灹भारी 玐ि猴 को नो琇टस जारी कर समे琈कत सूचना 灹瀡तुत करने के िलए कह सकता है । सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सांि榐यक琉 सं灡हण सं灡हण , रायपुर (छ. ग. ) -492006 [फा. सं. एस.-11014/औ. सां./सां. सं. अिध./2017-18-楹े. सं. 灹.] रीना 琐संह, उपमहािनदेशक MINISTRY OF STATISTICS & PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th September, 2019 S.O. 3371(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sections 3 and 4 of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 (7 of 2009), as amended in 2017 (21 of 2017), read with rules 5 and 7 of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, the Ministry of Statistics & Programme Implementation hereby directs Collection of Statistics on manufacturing and related activities through a statistical survey, hereinafter referred to as ‘Annual Survey of Industries 2018-19’, as per the details mentioned in the Schedule-I. 2. The Ministry further appoints the persons as also their assignees in office, mentioned in the Schedule II as Statistics Officers in respect of the geographical units mentioned thereof with reference to the aforesaid direction. Each Statistics Officer shall immediately submit an undertaking in the prescribed format, namely, Form-I appended to the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, to the Additional Director General, Field Operations Division, National Statistical Office, New Delhi. 3. The persons authorized by each statistics officer, after submission of undertaking in the prescribed format, namely, Form-I appended to the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 to the Statistics Officer, would be engaged in the geographical jurisdiction of the Statistics Officer for verification of information furnished by informants, for inspecting relevant records, and for seeking clarifications, as may be necessary, from informants. In accordance with these duties, each person authorized would carry a photo identity card and a letter of authorization issued by the concerned Statistics Officer. The Statistics Officer shall keep the undertakings of the authorized persons in his safe custody and forward a -- 6 of 9 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 certificate of having obtained the above undertakings to the Office of the Additional Director General, Field Operations Division, National Statistical Office, New Delhi. 4. The statistics collected in Part I of Annual Survey of Industries (ASI) schedule in respect of the ASI 2018-19 furnished by the informants, after due verification and scrutiny, will be processed by officials working at the Office of the Deputy Director General, Industrial Statistics Wing, Kolkata and the statistics collected in Part II of the ASI schedule thereof will be processed by officials working at the Labour Bureau. Subject to the provisions of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, the unit level data and the reports, generated from the data through statistical techniques, may be kept in custody and disseminated by the Industrial Statistics Wing and Data Storage and Dissemination Division of this Ministry and the Labour Bureau under the Ministry of Labour and Employment to the users within and outside the Government, the States/UTs and the public at large as per policy guidelines of the Government. 5. All persons engaged in any activity in respect of collection of statistics, processing of data and dissemination with respect to ASI 2018-19 are governed by the provisions under the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011. 6. Following powers have been delegated to the Statistics Officers: (a) A Statistics Officer is empowered to depute/authorize officials to collect statistics in respect of the aforementioned direction, to verify any information furnished by informants on the basis of business records and other records and to seek clarifications from any owner or occupier or person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, at the premises where such records are kept. A Statistics Officer is also empowered to depute/authorize officials under the administrative control of any State Government or Union territory Administration, which is willing to collect statistics from any of those factories/establishment for which the Statistics Officer has not deputed/authorized any official under his administrative control. (b) A Statistics Officer is empowered to give one month notice or for the period deemed fit to each of the informant for furnishing return in the format, specified for the purpose of collection of statistics. (c) A Statistics Officer is empowered to provide to any informant, the facility of furnishing return in electronic form through a web-portal for certain period, to be specified by him in the notice to be issued to the informant. SCHEDULE-I Subject and purpose for collection of statistics: 1. Statistics relating to growth, composition and structure of organized manufacturing sector comprising activities related to manufacturing processes, repair services, gas and water supply and cold storage is collected through Annual Survey of Industries 2018-19. Geographical area for collection of statistics: 2. The Annual Survey of Industries 2018-19 is conducted in the whole of India. Method of data collection: 3. A Notice will be issued by each Statistics Officer to informants under his jurisdiction, indicating therein the date by which, the officer or office to whom, the unit or units for which, and the formats and the manner in which information is required to be furnished, including submission of information in electronic form through a web-portal designed for the purpose and made available to informants up to a certain date, specified in the notice. Nature of informants for whom data may be collected: 4. The informants are owners or occupiers or persons in-charge, of factories registered under the Factories Act, 1948 or of establishments registered under the Beedi & Cigar Workers (Conditions of Employment) Act,1966 or the units registered under any of the following Acts/Boards/Authority viz., Companies Act, 1956, Shops and Commercial Establishments Act, Societies Registration Act, Cooperative Societies Act, Khadi and Village Industries Board, Directorate of Industries (District industries centre) who would be issued notice by Statistics Officer for furnishing information under the aforementioned direction. 5. A Statistics Officer may require furnishing of consolidated information in respect of two or more factories or establishments under a single management operating within a State or Union territory, in case information is not separately available for individual factories or establishments, through a notice issued to the concerned owner or occupier or person in-charge of the management. -- 7 of 9 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] Period during which collection of statistics may be completed: 6. The date for submission of information by each informant would be mentioned in the notice and would generally fall during October 2019 to June 2020. Reference period: 7. Information is required to be furnished for the financial year commencing from 1st April 2018 and ending on 31st March 2019 or for the Accounting Year of a unit ending on any date between 1st April 2018 and 31st March 2019. Nature of information to be collected: 8. The information required relates to assets and liabilities, receipts, expenses, input items (indigenous and imported), products and by-products, distributive expenses, employment and labour cost, working days, man-days worked, absenteeism, labour turnover, man-hours worked, earning and social security benefits. Language in which information is to be furnished by informant: 9. An informant shall furnish information in the prescribed formats, either in Hindi or in English. Obligation of informant: 10. An owner or occupier or person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, shall furnish information in the manner and by the date mentioned in the notice received by him from the concerned Statistics Officer. He should also furnish relevant records for inspection, and answer questions in relation to the information sought, as may be required by the Statistics Officer or a person authorized by him. Nature of business records and other records which may be inspected: 11. Business records of a unit, such as balance sheet, profit and loss account, muster rolls, attendance registers, labour register, pay rolls, Director’s report or any other document in support of the information furnished may be inspected by the Statistics Officer or a person authorized by him. The manner of inspection: 12. The concerned Statistics Officer or a person authorized by him may verify the information furnished under the aforementioned direction on the basis of business records and other records of the unit and seek clarifications, at the premises where such records are kept, from the concerned owner or occupier or a person in-charge of a factory or establishment or management, as the case may be, or a person authorized by him of the unit.
